rationale: Curated glossary entry: Natiq — Speaker; a law-giving prophet who opens a cosmic cycle. The Six Natiqs are Adam, Noah, Abraham, Moses, Jesus, Muhammad; the Seventh is the Qa'im.

rationale: Curated glossary entry: Imam — the divinely-designated guide of the believers, central to Ismaili (and Shi'i) theology.

annotation: Glossary term: امام علیہ السلام (al-Imam 'alayhi al-salam) — The Imam (peace be upon him)
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Honorific reference to the Imam.

rationale: Curated glossary entry: Nutfa — drop/sperm; the first Quranically-named stage of human embryogenesis.

rationale: Curated glossary entry: Allah — the proper name of God.

rationale: Curated glossary entry: Ilah — the generic word 'god/deity'; root of Allah.
